description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a light wood finish, standing on a flat, neutral-colored surface. The front face features two vertical doors with slim, metallic handles, and three smaller drawers aligned vertically on the lower right side, each with matching handles. The cabinet's sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing its boxy, utilitarian design. The handles are simple and functional, likely made of metal, and there are no visible label holders or locks on the exterior. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, practical piece of office furniture designed for document storage. Its clean lines and neutral color make it suitable for a variety of professional or administrative environments.
description: A tall, light wood filing cabinet with two doors and three drawers, featuring slim metallic handles and a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: The plain side of the cabinet is visible, showing a smooth, unbroken wood surface with no handles or drawers.
description_view_1: A narrow side profile of the cabinet, highlighting its depth and rectangular shape without any visible features.
description_view_2: The front view displays two vertical doors with metallic handles and three drawers with matching handles on the lower right.
description_view_3: The opposite narrow side profile, similar to view 1, showing a plain wood surface with no visible features.
